query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sugerencias` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int,
  `nombreUsuario` varchar(255),
  `emailUsuario` varchar(320),
  `asunto` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `mensaje` text NOT NULL,
  `leida` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 37KVpxZeS2CVQbP.root --database NUhPjFzKcLyhLeGMAd6M8H --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sugerencias` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int,
  `nombreUsuario` varchar(255),
  `emailUsuario` varchar(320),
  `asunto` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `mensaje` text NOT NULL,
  `leida` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
